nasb.text: From the days of John the Baptist until now the kingdom of heaven suffers violence, and violent men take it by force.

esv.text: From the days of John the Baptist until now the kingdom of heaven has suffered violence,  and the violent take it by force.

cnv.text: 從施洗的約翰的時候直到現在，天國不斷遭受猛烈的攻擊，強暴的人企圖把它奪去。

ccb.text: “从施洗者约翰到现在，天国一直在强劲地扩展着，强劲的人要抓住它。

csbs.text: 从施洗者约翰的日子到现在，天国是努力争取的，努力争取的人就得着它。
